column1: # id|enabled|no_model|model|serve|margin_milli|include_expr_text|notes
# This matrix is timing-first. Enabled rows are the current default experiment set:
# exact overhead control, cheap numeric models, and exp08 margin gates.
# Disabled rows preserve the old text/context variants for explicit opt-in runs.
# Existing model.pt rows are historical artifacts. Retrain clean variants from
# training/data/clean/train_splits.jsonl before treating benchmark scores as
# clean held-out results.
